title: DP-1 Playlist Extension
description: Extensions to DP-1 playlists for dynamic item fetching, enhanced metadata, and optional intermission notes

items.description: Per-item extension fields. Composed with the core playlist schema via allOf: each element must still satisfy PlaylistItem from the bundle, and may include optional note.

curators.description: Array of curator entities using the shared DP-1 extension entity shape

Note.description: Experimental intermission card: short artist-authored text between works. May be removed or changed in a future Playlist Extension version.

text.description: Short label or interlude text (not a social thread)

duration.description: How long to show the intermission page before continuing, in seconds. Omitted means 20.

Entity.description: Unified entity format for curators and publishers with verifiable identities

DynamicQuery.description: Machine-executable interface for fetching playlist items dynamically from external indexers

method.description: HTTP method (default: POST for graphql-v1, GET for https-json-v1)

headers.description: HTTP headers to include in the request

query.description: Query payload with optional {{...}} template placeholders

responseMapping.description: Instructions for parsing the indexer response

ResponseMapping.description: Configuration for extracting playlist items from indexer response

itemsPath.description: JSON path to the array of items (dot notation)

itemMap.description: Optional field mapping from response to DP-1 item schema
